author: doll-agent
content: Already shipped. ferray-random/src/bitgen/sfc64.rs has a full Sfc64 BitGenerator (NumPy-compatible 4-state init + 12-step warmup, Sebastian Vigna reference implementation), it's wired through bitgen/mod.rs, re-exported from the crate root in lib.rs:72, and has 3 unit tests (deterministic_output, different_seeds_differ, full_range). The issue body is stale — ferray-random ships 6 BitGenerators (Xoshiro256**, PCG64, PCG64DXSM, Philox, MT19937, SFC64), not 3. Closing.
